title: Excellent French Door Fridge with Plenty of Storag
text:
I've been very pleased with this Samsung 24 cu. ft. French door refrigerator. It offers plenty of storage space while maintaining a sleek, modern appearance that looks great in my kitchen. The French door design makes it easy to organize groceries and quickly find what I need.

The refrigerator keeps food consistently fresh, and the temperature remains stable throughout both the refrigerator and freezer sections. I especially like the adjustable shelves and spacious drawers, which make it easy to store everything from large party trays to fresh produce.

The unit runs quietly and is energy efficient. The freezer provides ample storage and keeps frozen foods well organized. My only minor complaint is that fingerprints can show on the exterior, requiring occasional wiping to keep it looking its best.

Overall, this refrigerator has exceeded my expectations. It's spacious, reliable, and packed with convenient features. I would definitely recommend it to anyone looking for a high-quality French door refrigerator.

title: Don’t buy from Samsung
text: This is a beautiful refrigerator.  I love the ice maker and beverage center, too bad it doesn’t work longer than 3 years.  I purchased the ENTIRE line of Samsung for my house when I built it 3 years ago. The dishwasher is already dead and so is this refrigerator.  My one star review is due to Samsung not standing by their products and their legal obligations to their warranty.  I have not had a working refrigerator since March 2026. It is now May 5, 2026.  I have had two technicians to my house and have had to miss 3 days of work (about 12 service visits). Each time the technicians have tried to replace parts and both technicians (different companies) have deemed the refrigerator non repairable. I had to pay for these service calls, Samsung requires them and doesn’t pay for them. And even after the report states “cannot be repaired” Samsung is still not issuing me a replacement for a refrigerator still under factory warranty. I will never buy another Samsung product again.

title: Good Value Refrigerator
text:
I had a 22 year old refrigerator, which finally gave up the ghost. The new Samsung refrigerator was ordered and received quickly. 

I like the precise temperature control. A thermometer placed in the top portion of the unit shows the unit maintains temperatures close to the temperature I set. Some other reviews have been critical of the ice maker, but my unit hasn't been a problem. It supplies plenty of ice. I am especially fond of the water dispensing features. There is a provided pitcher which gets filled automatically when even a little water is used from it. There is also a water dispenser for water dispensed into glasses or bottles. The water is cold and filtered. The outer door, which allows access to the water features, is something I have never seen and seems like a good idea. I'm constantly going for water and the design efficiently limits the flow of warm air into the unit while getting water or soft drinks on shelves. 

As for storage, there is minimal capability to adjust shelves and no adjustment for drawers. So far it hasn't been a problem and I don't anticipate it will be. The capacity is adequate for my needs, but others may find it insufficient in the "counter" depth refrigerator I have. My old refrigerator was not counter depth, and it had a lot of wasted space with a large tray drawer, which I never used. It also stuck out into the kitchen, and the new Samsung does not. 

One thing I do not like in the new refrigerator is all the plastic. My old refrigerator had aluminum and glass for drawers and shelves. Also, two drawers were gasketed for an airtight seal in the top portion of the unit. The light plastic construction of shelves and drawers is why I did not give the Samsung refrigerator 5 stars. I think for what this refrigerator cost, glass and metal should have been chosen instead of cheap, lightweight plastic, which is questionable in my mind as to its durability.

Regardless of my dislike of the plastic in the Samsung refrigerator, I think this is a good value appliance and recommend its purchase.

title: WILL LEAK
text: Reviewing service and product here because the number they tell you to call for service will NOT help you. Within a month of having this fridge I found out the water line was defective and leaking. I have fought with Samsung assistance for nearly TWO months trying to get a new fridge and only recently got a refund. One representative even insinuated I would have to go two weeks without a fridge. When I asked him what to do with all my food he told me "take it to your parent's house". AWFUL experience.

text: Moved into a home over the summer that the previous owner had recently purchased, and we love it! We were sad when we moved from our old home, which had a black stainless steel Samsung French door counter-depth refrigerator similar to this, but this is a definite upgrade! We love the dedicated beverage center with refilling water pitcher and other easy access to soft drinks, beer, and more. We use the small lower cubby in the center to put baybel cheeses. We actually did not think we'd use the pitcher as much but we use it ALL THE TIME. Also, love the ice maker in the freezer - it makes TONS of ice and it not as inconvenient as we thought it would be. Love the design too - even though it is slightly larger than our last fridge, having no handles and a completely flat front makes it fit our space better and makes the kitchen seem slightly larger. Overall, very happy with the purchase.

title: Terrible product and even worse support
text:
Left a review last week and wanted to update it but Samsung seems to make that pretty difficult. Fridge was looked at by a repair tech and he determined it was unfixable. So we called Samsung support and holy cow has it been an experience. They wouldn’t send out a replacement unit and would only reimburse us. But the problem is they would only reimburse us for the fridge and not the panels lol. After fighting with support they finally decided to refund me for the entire cost but told me I would need to dispose of the fridge. 

So I bought a fridge from Samsung that didn’t make it 3 years. Had to fight for full reimbursement and was told I would need to pay someone to remove the pile of junk. It was after this experience I didn’t just decide to never buy a Samsung appliance again but I will now never own anything with Samsung on it.

title: Decent product but don't buy from samsung.com
text:
We have always trusted Samsung products, which is why we chose to purchase a refrigerator, washer, and dryer directly from Samsung.com on August 29. However, our delivery experience with RXO has been nothing short of a nightmare.

RXO was assigned to deliver our appliances, but they failed multiple times, falsely claiming we weren’t home despite never arriving at the doorstep. After several missed deliveries, our refrigerator finally arrived months later—but with dents.

Samsung’s customer service initially seemed helpful and agreed to replace the damaged fridge. Unfortunately, the replacement delivery was even worse. When RXO’s team saw that our kitchen was on the second floor, they outright refused to deliver the refrigerator, despite having already removed its protective packaging. Repeated calls to both RXO and Samsung yielded no immediate resolution, forcing us to wait another month for a new delivery.

The next delivery team was far more professional and willing to help. They explained that the damage was likely due to the previous team stripping off the packaging prematurely. They did their best by replacing a few panels, but now we’re left with a fridge that still has visible dents. After months of frustration and multiple failed deliveries, we are simply exhausted from dealing with these two companies.

While we still believe in Samsung’s product quality, the delivery process through RXO has been incredibly disappointing. We expected better service when ordering directly from Samsung. Moving forward, we will think twice before purchasing directly from their website and would recommend others consider more reliable retailers.

title: Terrible, not reliable at all
text: I wish I had gone with a different brand... We have had this fridge since October 2022. At first it was great, but in July 2024 (when the unit was less than 2 years old) it completely stopped cooling one day. We had to throw away all of our food because we weren't home. Samsung took 2 weeks to schedule an appointment, then another week to order the replacement compressor. Last week, the fridge stopped working once again. We had just restocked our entire fridge of all essentials, spending a ton of money to buy new food and once again had to throw away every single item in our fridge because this happened while we were out of town. Now, it's been a week and I can't get the "certified" Samsung repair place to answer my phone calls or confirm a service appointment. Samsung customer service has been absolutely useless, telling me yesterday that they would call me back to confirm my appointment and then no one ever called. As a lifelong Samsung phone customer, I am extremely disappointed in this fridge. I wish I had bought a different more reliable brand and I will never purchase another Samsung appliance in my life because of this.

title: Bespoke - BeInLove - BeSpokeTheBest
text:
I am so incredibly impressed and in love with my Bespoke 3-door French style refrigerator. I traded in a counter depth side by side WP Gold that I ended up replacing more parts on it myself the last 9 years to get it's worth, barely :-(.  Surprisingly, the Bespoke cost me less than what I paid for the WP Gold 15 years ago!!  
Frist of all this Bespoke is incredibly quiet.  The 2 different sizes of ice and beverage center, are our absolute favorite part of this fridge along with it being counter depth and 24 Cu.Ft.  It is by far a very spacious fridge for the counter depth size.  I was worried about not liking the freezer on the bottom, but I am happy to report I have adjusted better than I thought.  
You will not be disappointed.  Truly a beautiful sleek and classy appliance that looks gorgeous.  Thank you, Samsung for offering a first responder discount along with $150 for my old fridge.  The delivery guys professional and careful bringing in new and hauling out old.  As an oncology breast RN, I truly appreciate this.  I have bragged to all I work what about what a great reward and savings Samsung offers.  Most importantly a quality appliance.  I can't wait to get the matching Bespoke stove, microwave and dishwasher down the road.  No need to question the decision, buy it!!!  It will NOT disappoint.

title: We love the beverage center and the ice maker.
text: A month in, and we are delighted with our new refrigerator.

title: Tiny ice cubes and large ice cubes!
text:
I love this fridge- mostly because for a family of three it is large enough to accommodate our needs. I am a huge fan of the two sizes of ice and the automatic water pitcher and water dispenser. I also like the connection to Samsung’s smart things because it warns me when the door is left open. 

This came with the home we purchased along with the other major appliances. I may have opted for the exterior drawer model instead of this model because we have frequent little ones that visit which would be perfect for cold snacks. Eg yogurt, cuties, and other small fruit, string cheese.

title: Beautiful fridge, great feature, a lot space
text: My Kenmore 24 year fridge still function,  but i wanted a new fridge. I looked at LG, GE and other brands but the Samsung Bespoke caught my attention. It is a nice looking and spacious refrigerator. I love the beverage center and the two option of the ice maker. I can make my ice coffee and save money. Love the fact that I do not see finger prints. I have space for everything. I am in love with my fridge. I like the fact I can custom change the doors. At this point I am in love with the brand, so I also got a dish washer. But now I need a range!!!

title: Form meets Function
text: The Samsung Bespoke 3-Door French Door Refrigerator is a stylish choice for those seeking both aesthetics and functionality. With removable colored panels, it allows for customization without commitment. The 24-cubic-foot capacity provides ample space, and the fully removable tray produces two types of ice. Additionally, you can monitor temperature and performance. Whether you’re upgrading or replacing, this fridge combines form and function beautifully.

title: Flipper malfunction
text: Absolutely love the frig. itself. It's exactly what I was looking for!! The center flipper not working and needs repair. Manual closure necessary or does not stay cool and condensation collects on outside.

title: This model fit and provided the desired features.
text: We moved, and due to size constraints at our new house, could not bring our full depth 4-door flex with us.  After careful review of dimensions, we found we had to forgo the 4-door flex series and opted for this model instead.  While I certainly miss the 'flex' compartment which we highly utilized for breads, some veggies and various adult beverages, this counter depth French Door model has lived up to the Samsung Refrigerator reputation and has many of the options we desired such as the auto-filling 'bottomless' in door water pitcher and dual sized ice makers (without the problematic dispenser through the door issues).

title: Great features
text: I'm very happy with this Samsung bespoke refrigerator.

title: Love Samsung
text: The best purchase I’ve made. It’s my 4th Samsung appliance purchase. I also the the SmartThings app

title: TOTAL SCAM
text: Do not buy online!!  I have spent almost a full year and countless hours on the phone and online chat trying to have Samsung resolve the issue with this refrigerator. When I purchased it, the gray glass was out of stock. I was assured by a Samsung associate that I would be able to receive free replacement panels, but not until after the refrigerator was delivered. They gave me a promo code to use.  Fridge was delivered, but when I tried to order the panels, they were still out of stock. Two months or so later when they were finally back in stock I tried ordering and discovered that the promo code didn’t work. Called Samsung and they said, here have a different code.  Tried this one and it also didn’t work.  Called back and someone told me that neither code would ever work because the codes worked for dishwashers not for refrigerators. I finally spoke with a woman named HoneyLynn who assured me that she would help me. She would put in a request for 2 separate promo codes of $200 + $174 to cover the cost. Then she ghosted me. All along the way the associates promised to help me and asked me NOT to leave a bad review.  I asked for multiple supervisors but was told the best they could do for me was a $200 off coupon despite the fact that I have it in writing in the chat history that I have a copy of (emailed from Samsung) along with the associates name of who promised the free panels.  I wouldn’t have bought this fridge if I knew I wouldn’t be getting the glass panels.  It’s not even that nice of a fridge: it’s smaller than my previous fridge, has awkward shaped door pockets, and the side is black. Worst of all is the most awful customer service I have ever experienced. I will NEVER again purchased anything from Samsung.

title: Be spoken to: A Reliable Upgrade from in door ice!
text:
I recently acquired the French door refrigerator from Samsung, and I must say, it has exceeded my expectations in numerous ways. One standout feature is Samsung's decision to relocate the ice machine from the door or inside the refrigerator to the freezer compartment, a move that not only optimizes storage space within the refrigerator but also enhances its reliability.

After using it for a month and a half, I'm pleased to report that I haven't encountered any significant issues apart from a minor misalignment of the doors, which is a negligible inconvenience. Admittedly, in the realm of modern appliances, concerns about long-term reliability can arise due to factors like build quality and a lack of quality control. However, my optimism about this refrigerator's durability remains intact, especially considering the recommendations for this unit from a few maintenance technicians.

title: Nice looking refrigerator with good technology
text: I bought this unit because it was counter depth and 70 in. It has the appearance that I was looking for and the two condenser one compressor technology seems to work great to control freezer and fridge temps. Time will tell.

title: Ice maker is nice
text: I am very happy with this refrigerator. I love the water area and the two door to get drinks fast.

title: Bad Dimensions
text: The refrigerator seems to be everything we wanted. It has been in use for a whole day so I am not going to say anything positive or negative about the performance. My complaint is the dimensions. The fridge is 70" tall on the outside measurement to the top of the hinge, just like it is described. It is NOT 70" tall in the middle. The top plastic cover has an approximately 8"+ long "bubble" in the middle making it about 70.1875" tall. So if your opening is 70" tall, prepare for your counter depth refrigerator to stick out 4+ inches more, or prepare to remove flooring if possible.

title: Samsung Bespoke refrigerator
text: I love my Samsung bespoke refrigerator! Love Samsung products all together. They haven’t disappointed me ever.

title: Beautiful fridge, misleading measurements.
text: Beautiful fridge, misleading measurements.  With clean modern lines, we wanted to spend extra to get the counter depth refrigerator.  When installed, we discovered that we could not push the fridge in to get the benefits of counter depth, but design required that we pull fridge 8-10” out from the wall to be able to open the doors.  BUYER BEWARE ~ the doors require an additional 4” of width to allow the doors to open.  Poor hinge design.  Now I have a counter depth fridge, I paid a premium for, with less storage, sticking out as far as a standard depth fridge.

title: 10/10 Delivery, Install, Design & Performance!
text:
I received my new fridge a few weeks ago, and I have nothing but FANTASTIC things to say about it!
I'm coming from a 15+ year old fridge, so I truly don't have much to compare to, but this Samsung Bespoke has met -- exceeded, even -- my expectations entirely. First off, the installers were excellent! I've never had such a smooth delivery, installation AND haul away. They knew what they were doing and man, they DID IT! I was a little worried because my old fridge was so....old, but no issues at all.
The fridge itself is beautiful. I'm obsessed with the dual ice and the auto fill pitcher! Some days I'll grab some ice and/or water and will just sit there listening to how quickly this thing fills back up! I haven't had a working ice maker in at least a year; this almost brought tears to my face. It's always the perfect temperature, even on extra hot days. I've never fathomed having a smart fridge, but I love it. So easy to connect to SmartThings (do it while your fridge is open, it'll connect the quickest this way) and the controls are very simple to understand. SO much space in both fridge and freezer - and don't get me started on the beverage center. I chose this over the flex zone because of how dang convenient it looked...and it IS! Everyone who has came over has been so impressed. From the sleek, stainless steel look, to the massive amount of internal space...it's a winner all around.
Good price, even better performance. 10/10 recommend! Just make sure to measure...and don't forget about any hidden cabinets that are 5' taller than you are like I *almost* did 😅

title: Very happy so far!
text: The look of this fridge is top notch. I just received it about 2 weeks ago and it has been doing great. The counter depth makes it fit perfectly in my small kitchen. The 2 different types of ice are great with the included ice scooper that stows away neatly. The water pitcher is a real help also, because the water dispenser is a little bit slow, but perfect when you only have 1 hand free.

title: Love the features!
text: I bought this refrigerator a few weeks ago. The features are great!  Love that I can check the temperature on my phone. I also receive alerts if the door is left open.

title: Don't waste your time purchasing direct from Samsu
text: Ordered the refrigerator, set the delivery date and the delivery company never showed up. This happened two more times over the course of 6 weeks. Ended up canceling the order and purchase a refrigerator locally.

title: Like the dual ice makers .
text: So far I really happy with this refrigerator & features.

title: Love all features
text: Best choice I ever made in a refrigerator. Love everything about it. From the beverage center, 2 sizes in ice cubes and loads of room. I would recommend this refrigerator to everyone I know and I have. Great product.

title: This would be a great Frig if it would get cold!
text: I've had this frig for just under 2 weeks and the frig compartment temp can never get below 40 degrees (it's normally 42 and is set at 34).  The freezer on the other hand will go down to -18.6!  The warranty service tech said that it passes all tech codes and the frig stays below 45 degrees, so Samsung doesn't consider it "defective."  I asked if it's normal for this model to have a freezer that will get to -18.6?  He said he's never seen one go lower than -7 to -8.  I asked him to email me the data that he downloaded from my frig which also has the tech performance specs that Samsung service uses.  He said he would, but it had to go through Samsung's approval to send it.  I have not received the data, probably because Samsung doesn't want people to see their real specs.  45 degrees in the frig is not acceptable, it is a food safety issue.  Doing more research, the Refrigerator has a 3-way refrigerant valve that controls the flow of refrigerant to the two separate evaporators.  It appears that the 3-way valve is miss aligned, sending too much refrigerant to the freezer (and making it colder than necessary), while starving the refrigerator section of refrigerant and making it too warm.  Samsung verified the refrigerator is properly installed in my home for air clearance, the gaskets are good, the doors are rarely opened, and the ambient temp is 70 degrees, yet it won't cool properly.  It has an obvious manufacturing defect, yet Samsung won't stand behind their product (which is their top of the line series) and fix the problem.  Love the look and the beverage center, but now I have to rent a truck and return it myself to Costco because it won't get cold enough.  I have used electronic thermocouples for years to monitor my multiple refrigerators and have never seen an issue like this.

title: Convenient sleek but can't be flush
text:
We have the counter depth fridge. The fridge itself has so much more storage than we really need. The beverage center is awesome for both people who love flavored drinks and water. The pitcher is fast and convenient, the beverage center allows for a quick access to a good selection of drinks. The only downside is that if you have taller cans or bottles, they only fit in the middle shelf. The ice maker is convenient. I like that you don't need a separate ice maker to have plenty of ice for guests. The downside with the counter depth is the amount of freezer space you get. The shelves are shallow so be careful about not getting anything caught on the seal of the freezer.

Overall we love the fridge. there's just some minor things about the door that we'd like to change. The door swing requires a lot of room. The door depth being the primary issue causing the fridge to have to protrude out or the side requiring more than a 2inch gap. also the Stainless steel is not fingerprint resistant unlike our other appliances... it shows really easily.

title: Love the auto fill water pitcher
text: The best refrigerator we have ever purchased! Everything works and looks awsome!

title: Worth the money
text: I’m so happy with my purchase. I bought this refrigerator November 2023 . French door says it’s all. Cooling system is great , ice maker works well , love  the double ice tray . Beverage center is amazing as well . So far no issues ! I gave it 4 stars because I really wish the shelves had more space .

title: Great features
text: Bought a couple of months ago. Really happy with it. Love the drink station.

title: Overall good!
text: looks great and the pitcher is my favorite part. Ice maker is nice but seems to be low on ice all the time. Outside is a nice slick look.  I am not pleased that the shelf's do not have more options to move in the fridge for better storage.

title: Bespoke is overrated
text: I purchased my bespoke back in September 2023. It took almost a month to receive it. I was not impressed with Samsung's shipper. Their customer service was a terrible experience. Two weeks after insulation, I had to submit a warranty request for a damaged shelf. After receiving the new shelf, it appears that it is also damaged and is probably a manufacturer defect. It is the collapsible shelf. You cannot place anything heavy on this shelf. All in all, I do like the fridge and to spruce it up, I will probably change out the panels.

title: None
text: I bought this item and it didn’t work lost food after two days and the coldest fridge and freezer would get was 53F ice maker didn’t work either👎

title: Great features
text: I bought this 4 months ago and I am so happy I did

title: Sleek looking functional refrigerator
text: I bought the refrigerator in Nov.  We liked the modern look of it.   We love the beverage center and the fact that it is counter depth allows the kitchen to look more stream lined.

title: Buy 3-door and get a fourth hidden and FREE!
text: This is our first French Door refrigerator (which we're adjusting to) and put all everyday milk, 1/2&1/2 and OJ on the right side while accessing the shelving for left overs.  On the other side are actually two doors (one behind the other) and two areas under door panel that allows for opening the pair or just the lead with the first offering cold fresh filtered water.  If opening the other latch it allows full opening.  The ice maker is also unique offering two different sized cubes (very refreshing).

title: Maybe a decent fridge. Wouldn't know, never got it
text:
Ordered this fridge for my new house. The delivery company confirmed it would be delivered 12/29, I even called to triple checked. Based on this, drove an hour and waited 4 hours for the fridge. never came, cancelled by the delivery company after the delivery window. Contacted Samsung chat, told it would be in at 8am the next morning. Drove out again, no delivery.
Spent an hour on the phone with samsung about two missed appointments. Offered a rebate and a delivery on 1/2. On 1/2--thankfully before the window--the delivery was rescheduled to 1/4. On 1/4 my wife waited from 3-7 for the delivery. Delivery company cancelled at 6:50 after a nearly 4 hour wait.
This is completely unacceptable. If this thing ever shows up, I am refusing delivery. Ordered a Bosch from another merchant, delivered no problem. Terrible delivery company, terrible service. I am deeply dissatisfied with samsung and was planning on buying the frame tv for over my fireplace. Not anymore...

title: Lots of room for a counter-depth refrigerator.
text: Everyone loves this new refrigerator.  We purchased this counter depth fridge to replace a standard depth unit in the kitchen but have found the Samsung Bespoke is actually easier to use and holds just as much.  The finger print resistant surface is easy to clean and looks great.

title: Happy
text: I purchased this item a little over a month ago and I have been extremely happy with my decision. It is beautifully designed in both function and appearance. In my mind, the beverage station and the duel ice makers are two of the best features.

title: Great features
text: So happy with this product! Been using it for 2 months and absolutely love the beverage center and ice choices!

title: Great design
text: Good design. The beverage center is very useful. The space is well utilized and very well designed

title: Best fridge ever!
text: We bought this fridge a month ago and so far it's amazing. It has minimalistic and modern look, but also very functional. We love the beverage center - the pitcher full of water and quick access to drinks and snacks. Inside of the fridge is also very specious and convenient.

title: French door refrigerator
text: I have this refrigerator more than a year . No issues love it . Water feature is very useful.

title: Sexy Refridgerator
text: This counter depth fridge is very sharp with clean lines and bright stainless steel finish.  I love the dual ice cube sizes and the water pitcher stored behind the left outer door.  The smooth glossy finish shows about every finger and hand print but is easy to wipe down without streaks and smudges.  The freezer drawers hold a good amount of groceries and are easy to access and organize.  Perhaps the oddest characteristic is the right side crisper drawer that can only be opened with both outer doors open

title: Great investment!
text:
We bought this around 6 months back and we are so happy with it. The fridge has lot of useful space. The space has been carefully designed to meet most of your needs. 

When we bought it we thought the handless design would be perfect but now I regret it. It leaves lot of marks on the door especially with kids.

title: Sleek modern fridge
text: Bought this a bought 2 months ago and it’s great! Sleek design and very modern! Love the beverage center and that it has two sizes for ice!

title: Sounds small but it's not!
text: I recently purchased for my kitchen remodel.  I wanted a smaller fridge to match the counter depth.  I was concerned that it would be too small but it's not.  It lines up nicely in my small kitchen and it actually has plenty of space.  I don't love the shelving in the fridge or maybe it has more drawers than I am used too.  The freezer looked small too but it hold everything just fine.  Of course, the beverage center is the crown Jewel.  The self filling pitcher is great.  It's the main attraction.

title: Some repairs
text: We love the fridge but we will need someone to come out to adjust the door on left side due to rubbing when open

title: Far from fingerprint proof free.
text: The stainless steel fingerprint proof is just not true. It shows every fingerprint and always looks dirty. I feel misled by Samsung.

title: Great and beautiful fridge
text: Best fridge. Nice looking fridge with customizable panel with the color of your choice.

title: Great refrigerator!  Awesome features!
text: Very nice functionality, very spacious, even temperatures.  Love the water station design and usefulness!

title: Fine fridge otherwise but vegetables rot quickly
text:
I like the beverage center and the clean look. It works fine for all other types of foods, but the crisper drawer for vegetables is useless. In this fridge greens rot twice as fast as out 20 year-old GE refrigerator. Why? The "Crisper+" and "Crisper" drawers have no way to adjust or allow for higher humidity. They're just drawers with some space on top; they have no airflow or humidity control like your old fridge. I'm having major buyer's remorse. 

(I found this after I bought it) if you search for "Vegetables going bad sooner in new Samsung refrigerator", you can find a full forum of people with the same problem. Samsung cut major corners. It's not worth the price. Don't do it!

title: Best fridge EVER…..
text: I can’t tell you how over the moon I am for this refrigerator!!! We bought the Bespoke counter depth. Not only is it functional, runs perfectly (except for a little issue with the pitcher not filling completely on occasion), it’s beautiful!!! I’m having so much fun ordering different color panels. I ordered it in stainless, bough the blue panels which is current on there and just recently received the orange one!! They are so easy to change and store in their boxes nicely anywhere. So excited to be able to change it up. The two sizes of ice is tenuous and we were provided with a scooper!! I’m so glad I don’t have water and ice on my door anymore. This us much more functional. The inside is plenty big enough fir a counter depth and you can actually see what’s in it. I can’t tell you how many items got buried at the back if my last full sized French door. I will always spout that this us the best fridge on the market today!!! Can’t wait to order my new Samsung Cooktop freestanding range!!! Thank you Samsung for making this beautiful appliance!!

title: Great Love this Refrigerator
text: I just so glad this is the one with the beverage center just the best I have ever had.

title: Do not buy
text: This fridge is terrible.  Only one adjustable shelf.  Can’t stand any bottles up and no room for leftovers after a big dinner.  I’m so disappointed with my choice to by this fridge.  Less room than my 25cf I had.  Deceiving 30cf

title: So glad we bought it.
text: We are very happy with our purchase , we enjoy seeing neighbors ad friends faces when we open it up !

title: Great Refrigerator smudges fast
text: Using it for a month now. With handles it smudges fast. Also it dents fast just mildly touchi by the microwave door being open. Otherwise it is great with smart features

title: Love it
text: I really love this fridge.  It has plenty of room, is easy to organize and we love the beverage center.  The ice maker works great also.  Makes plenty of ice.  Have only had it a few weeks so I hope it will continue to give me excellent performance.

title: Missing major  parts
text: Refrigerator is missing parts. I do not recommend this item.

title: Love the beverage center
text: it's been less than a week with my new appliance and everything is working as promised.  really like the two-size ice cube maker and the beverage center!

title: Clean look
text: I’m happy with our new refrigerator,love the beverage center

title: Sleek looking
text: I purchased this refrigerator lass than a month ago and I am so happy with it. I love that there are no more handles to try to clean around and with the beverage center and water dispenser inside there are no more water streaks running down the face of my fridge!  There is always a pitcher of ice cold water that automatically refills.  Having the option of choosing from two different size ice cubes is an added bonus!

title: Great
text: This is a true counter depth refrigerator. The absence of handles means every inch that I have goes to Colts base. The icemaker has a true on and off switch as opposed to the flimsy bar of other brands. The auto fill pitcher means I no longer have to deal with a Brita.  Super happy.
